Class ConstructorFacade<C>

java.lang.Object
iu.type.ElementBase
iu.type.AnnotatedElementBase<Constructor<C>>
iu.type.DeclaredElementBase<C, Constructor<C>>
iu.type.ExecutableBase<C, C, Constructor<C>>
iu.type.ConstructorFacade<C>
Type Parameters:
C - constructor declaring type
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.type.IuAnnotatedElement, edu.iu.type.IuConstructor<C>, edu.iu.type.IuDeclaredElement<C>, edu.iu.type.IuExecutable<C,C>, edu.iu.type.IuParameterizedElement, ParameterizedFacade
final class ConstructorFacade<C> extends ExecutableBase<C, C, Constructor<C>> implements edu.iu.type.IuConstructor<C>
Facade implementation for IuConstructor.
